scene.location: A highway passing through a devastated forest
scene.incident_type: Post-fire aftermath and mass vehicle pileup
scene.environment: Surrounded by charred, leafless trees and scorched ground
scene.key_elements: Burned-out vehicle husks, ash-covered roadway, multi-car collision, desolate landscape

description: Grim scene of devastation on a highway cutting through a forest completely consumed by fire. The landscape is dominated by the skeletal remains of charred trees and ash-blackened earth. On the roadway, there is a massive pileup consisting of 20 vehicles, many of which appear severely damaged, scorched, or covered in white ash. The cars are scattered across both lanes in various states of disarray, indicating a chaotic event. No civilians or emergency personnel are visible.
